title: Ilhéus, BA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ilhéus, BA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ilhéus is a city in BA with a population of 180,210. Bahia’s cocoa capital, immortalized by Jorge Amado’s novels, with beautiful Atlantic rainforest beaches and historic cacao plantations.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
